description: After being repainted, an aileron must be re-balanced to prevent aerodynamic flutter.

nodes.task_description: Mount the aileron on a balancing rig.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly sets up the aileron for balancing.

nodes.task_description: Check the balance of the aileron and compare it to the specifications in the maintenance manual.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the aileron is out of balance.

nodes.task_description: Add or remove balance weights at specified locations until the aileron is balanced within the required tolerance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully balances the aileron and documents the final weight configuration.
